narrative:
Precinct Urbana 4-B (precinct in Champaign County) has 866 registered voters, with 67.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
